_description: Persistent research queue. Event-driven MBO models ONLY. Updated post-audit session 53.
_phase: EARLY RESEARCH — testing which EVENT architectures show promise

event_architectures_gpu.goal: Find which event-driven architecture beats CNN1D baseline (concat IC_10s=0.132). Each GPU runs a DIFFERENT untested architecture.
event_architectures_gpu.baseline: EventCNN1D concat_ic_10s=0.132 (champion, 10+ runs, DO NOT RERUN)

experiments.name: Event Mamba SSM (w=500, b=16)
experiments.description: Time-aware selective state space model. O(n) complexity, longer context than transformer. Pure PyTorch (no mamba_ssm package). Prior runs all OOM'd — fixed with batch=16.

experiments.name: Event 3D CNN
experiments.description: Event windows binned into 2D orderbook activity images (T=20 time bins x P=40 price bins x 5 feature channels). Conv2d with residual blocks. ~500K-1M params.

experiments.name: Hawkes / Temporal Point Process
experiments.description: Model inter-event arrival times + event types. Self-exciting process with continuous-time GRU. Exponential decay between events, discrete update on each event. ~302K params.

experiments.name: Neural ODE on event stream
experiments.description: Continuous-time dynamics between MBO events. State evolves continuously, updates discretely on each event. torchdiffeq required.

experiments.name: Variable-resolution event encoder
experiments.description: Adaptive resolution: high-res during sweeps/bursts, low-res during calm. Learns when to zoom in. Attention-based resolution selection.

experiments.name: Event CNN1D wider (channels=256, layers=8)
experiments.description: Wider/deeper variant of champion CNN1D. Test if more capacity improves IC. Uses existing script with env var overrides.

experiments.name: Event Transformer with longer context (w=1000)
experiments.description: MLflow shows TF DEGRADES with larger windows: ws=500→0.104, ws=750→0.060, ws=1000→0.043. Longer context HURTS transformer. Low priority unless architecture changes.
experiments.note: DEPRIORITIZED: IC drops 60% at ws=1000 vs ws=500

completed_architectures._description: DO NOT RERUN THESE. Results are established.

event_cnn_1d.note: Proven baseline. Multiple configs tested. No need to rerun unless new data added.

event_transformer_fast.note: Below CNN1D. w=500 default config. Longer context (w=1000) still untested on Uranus.

bar_3d_cnn.note: Uses 100ms BAR snapshots, NOT event data. Already run. Do NOT rerun.

bar_cnn_wider.note: Bar-based wider CNN. The original champion. Superseded by event-driven pivot.

bar_temporal_lstm_tft.note: All temporal bar models had inflated per-fold IC but ~0 concat IC. Dead end.

orderflow_features_cpu.goal: Engineer MBO-based features for LGBM input. Run on CPU nodes (Jupiter/Saturn).

experiments.name: Volume Profile features (POC, VA, HVN/LVN)
experiments.description: Compute session volume profiles, value area, POC from MBO events. Test IC as LGBM features.

experiments.name: Footprint delta/imbalance features
experiments.description: Per-level delta, cumulative delta divergence, stacked imbalance detection from MBO.

experiments.name: Large order tracking features
experiments.description: Track large orders via MBO unique IDs. Absorption, iceberg, spoofing detection.

experiments.name: DOM heatmap / depth features
experiments.description: Depth clustering, wall detection, time-weighted depth, depth imbalance over time.

issues.name: MBO initial book state
issues.description: MBO events don't include initial order book snapshot. Orders placed before recording starts are invisible. First N minutes of each day have incomplete book reconstruction. Need to check if our data pipeline accounts for this (opening snapshot or warm-up period).
